headline: arxiv-llm-daily
blurb: Daily digest of fresh arXiv papers in cs.CL and cs.AI, committed to git. The git history is the slowest possible newsletter.

headline: api-diff
blurb: Vendor API documentation changes, tracked in git. The git history IS the changelog. Tracks Stripe, GitHub REST, Anthropic, MDN, Python PEPs, RFCs.

headline: crate-of-the-day
blurb: One hand-picked Rust crate highlighted every day, committed to git. A daily dose of ecosystem serendipity.
